payload.title: Hosted UI: remove all workspace-creation (no attach, no new-project)
payload.description: On the deployed/hosted UI hide the attach button entirely (filesystem concept) AND the 'New project' button — projects are member-driven: they appear because a local workspace connected and pushed up. Hosted UI = collaboration view of your member projects only. The empty state should explain 'projects show up here when you connect a local workspace', not offer a create button. (Pending the product confirmation on whether to keep a minimal hosted create fallback.)
